attacking_style: Opportunistic break rider who targets intermediate sprints for bonus seconds rather than stage wins. Shows willingness to join breakaways but lacks finishing punch for victories.
team_tactics: Astana utilizes him as a placement rider in breakaways to secure team presence and potential GC bonus seconds through intermediate sprints rather than stage victories.
terrain_preference: Suited to medium-difficulty stages where breaks have survival chances and intermediate sprints offer tactical value. Exposed on stages requiring explosive finishing power.
vulnerability: Lacks final punch to convert breakaway presence into wins when facing strong finishers. Cannot compete in pure sprint finishes even from reduced groups.
key_patterns: Targets intermediate sprints strategically when GC contenders and pure sprinters skip them (2 observations)
Placed in breakaways by Astana for team positioning but finishes 3rd or lower (2 observations)
Active at Tirreno-Adriatico specifically, suggesting comfort in Italian week-long stage races (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent role as breakaway placement rider without progression to winning ability shown across 2021-2022
